meta.title: Confirm admin email change
meta.description: Confirm the new email address for your admin account.

adminEmailChange.title: Confirm admin email change
adminEmailChange.subtitle: Review the result of your admin email change confirmation before signing in again.

success.title: Your admin email is confirmed
success.message: The new admin email address is now active. Sign in again to continue.

invalid-link.title: This confirmation link is invalid
invalid-link.message: The email change link is missing or invalid.

expired.title: This confirmation link has expired
expired.message: Start the email change request again from the admin panel.

failed.title: The email address could not be changed
failed.message: Try the email change request again from the admin panel.

service-unavailable.title: The confirmation service is temporarily unavailable
service-unavailable.message: Please try again in a few minutes.
